prestazioni: Engine: Turbocharged 2.0L VTEC Turbo (K20C4) with a PRL Motorsports Stage 2+ Hybrid Turbo Kit featuring a Garrett GTX3071R Gen II turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel) paired with a custom 3.5" downpipe and PRL Motorsports high-flow catted mid-pipe, supporting 350+ WHP on E30 fuel blend with Hondata FlashPro ECU calibration (rev-hang elimination, 7,200 RPM redline, and custom ignition timing maps for 93 octane + ethanol).

Suspension: Full Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilover kit (part #ACU-RDX-20) with 8-position adjustable compression/rebound damping, 20mm adjustable ride height, and spherical upper mounts for improved camber control, paired with Cusco front strut tower bar (Type OS) and Whiteline rear sway bar (24mm adjustable).

Drivetrain: Spec-D Motorsports 4.10 final drive ratio swap (OEM 3.52) with a limited-slip differential from a 2021 TLX Type S (part #41200-TZ5-A51), mated to a South Bend Clutch Stage 3 daily organic/ceramic hybrid disc and billet flywheel for K-series applications, with Motul Gear 300 75W-90 fluid for the transmission and differential.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (RDX-specific, part #RB-ACU-RDX-ASPEC) with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and duckbill rear spoiler, paired with a Seibon Carbon fiber hood (part #ACU-RDX-20-HOOD) featuring a 30mm vented heat extractor and custom matte gold vinyl wrap with 3M 2080-G12 gloss black accents.

Wheels: WORK Emotion CR Kiwami 20x9.5 +25 (front) and 20x10.5 +30 (rear) in Hyper Silver finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (265/35/20 front, 285/30/20 rear) with custom TPMS sensors calibrated for 38 PSI cold pressure. Wheel spacers: 15mm Hubcentric adapters (front) and 25mm (rear) from WCI Racing with extended wheel studs (M14x1.5).

Lighting: Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED headlights (plug-and-play, DOT-approved) with custom Morimoto HID projector retrofit (5500K, 35W) and GTR Lighting Ultra Series 2 fog light LEDs, paired with a custom rear light setup featuring sequential turn signals (using OEM A-Spec housings with Novsight NS-1 sequential controllers) and smoked taillight overlays from VLand.
